signals.headline: US Signals New Iran Talks in Days as Ceasefire Holds | YES | MED confidence**[2]
signals.raw:
US Signals New Iran Talks in Days as Ceasefire Holds | YES | MED confidence**[2]

On April 15, US President Trump indicated new negotiations with Iran could start within days, with Pakistan offering to host after failed Islamabad talks; VP JD Vance confirmed the ceasefire is holding and described recent high-level meetings as constructive, seeking nuclear limits for economic relief[2].
